description: Reconstruct the sky conditions during a delayed search and rescue helicopter mission on Mt. Hood, Oregon (45.3736° N, 121.6959° W, 3429 m). Starting from February 4, 2024, at 07:00:00 UTC, determine the exact UTC time of moonrise, defined as the moment the Moon's geometric center crosses the 0° altitude line on the azimuthal grid. The simulation should be configured to show the mathematical geometric horizon by disabling the atmosphere and landscape. Capture a screenshot centered on the Moon while it is below the horizon and a second screenshot at the exact moment of moonrise to ~/Pictures/stellarium/. Record the moonrise time in HH:MM format to ~/Desktop/sar_illumination_report.txt.
